customer_addr:
RESEARCH AND SPONSORED PROGRAM
800 W. MAIN STREET
WHITEWATER, WI 53190

citations.narrative:
An Annual Report of Research Facility for the use of animals has not been submitted for fiscal year 2025. Facility
representatives confirmed that a report hasn't been submitted and that contact information not being updated likely led to
representative(s) not receiving USDA's notification/instructions on annual report submission. This facility reported during
inspection no use of AWA-regulated animals this past year, however an annual report is required to be submitted by Dec
1st each year (extended to Dec 31st in 2025 due to the government shutdown) by registered research facilities per the
Animal Welfare Act to record the number and type of USDA-regulated animals used in research. Ensure to submit a 2025
Annual Report and then ensure that an annual report each year is submitted by December 1st that covers the previous
fiscal year.
***Correct by 6/19/2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with facility representatives. No regulated animals were on the
premises at the time of inspection.
n
